quick_skim.title: On the Genealogy of Machine Learning Weather Prediction
quick_skim.abstract: Modern machine-learning weather prediction (MLWP) has largely inherited the initial-value-problem (IVP) framing of numerical weather prediction (NWP). This inheritance leads to a dominant paradigm of learned autoregressive time-stepping and constrains how the learning problem is defined and architectures are favored. In this study we make the inheritance explicit, contrast two philosophical traditions: "scientific surrogate modeling," where machine learning (ML) is embedded within a physical system and must respect its structural constraints, and "free-form data-driven modeling," where atmospheric fields are treated as spatiotemporal sequences and models learn latent dynamics without explicit physical constraints. By reviewing the governing primitive equations, surveying recent literature, and analyzing concrete physical examples, we map each modeling paradigm to either a state-conditioned or evolution operator formulation. We conclude that principled model selection requires explicitly aligning architecture and training objectives with either the physical system structure or the statistical structure of the data.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: discusses scientific surrogate modeling for atmospheric dynamics
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 讨论用于大气动力学的科学代理建模
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 讨论用于大气动力学的科学代理建模
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 讨论用于大气动力学的科学代理建模
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Traces the genealogy of ML weather prediction, contrasting scientific surrogate modeling with free-form data-driven approaches, highlighting the need for physical constraints.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文审视了机器学习天气预报（MLWP）的谱系，指出现有方法大多继承数值天气预报的初值问题框架，导致过度依赖自回归时间步进。通过对比“科学代理建模”和“自由形式数据驱动”两种哲学，作者强调在MLWP中融入物理约束的重要性。该综述为将代理建模方法推广至化学传输和空气质量模型提供了理论基础。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文审视了机器学习天气预报（MLWP）的谱系，指出现有方法大多继承数值天气预报的初值问题框架，导致过度依赖自回归时间步进。通过对比“科学代理建模”和“自由形式数据驱动”两种哲学，作者强调在MLWP中融入物理约束的重要性。该综述为将代理建模方法推广至化学传输和空气质量模型提供了理论基础。

quick_skim.title: Intrinsic Green's Learning: Supervised Learning on Manifolds via Inverse PDE
quick_skim.abstract: We introduce Intrinsic Green's Learning (IGL), a framework that models a target function on a manifold as the solution to a linear PDE whose source term is learned from data. Rather than approximating the target directly, IGL learns a source and integrates it against a Green's kernel. An encoder discovers a low-dimensional coordinate chart on the manifold where both the source and the kernel decompose as low-rank tensors, collapsing a high-dimensional integral into independent one-dimensional integrals with cost linear in the intrinsic dimension. A two-stage algorithm separates coordinate discovery from source fitting, a near-convex linear solve, preventing the dimensional collapse of joint training. Learnable gates on each coordinate automatically discover the intrinsic dimension of the manifold. We validate IGL on synthetic manifolds and on MNIST, where it simultaneously achieves near-optimal classification and automatic recovery of the intrinsic dimension.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: inverse PDE learning Green's function for manifold learning
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 逆PDE学习格林函数用于流形学习
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 逆PDE学习格林函数用于流形学习
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 逆PDE学习格林函数用于流形学习
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Introduces Intrinsic Green's Learning (IGL), a framework that learns a source term and integrates with Green's kernel to model functions on manifolds, applicable to physical PDEs like advection-diffusion.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 在高维流形上学习目标函数面临维数灾难。本文提出内在格林学习(IGL)，将目标函数表示为线性PDE的解，通过学习源项并与格林核积分，在高维空间中实现线性复杂度。该方法可应用于大气传输中的平流扩散和质量守恒问题，为物理信息神经算子提供了新思路。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 在高维流形上学习目标函数面临维数灾难。本文提出内在格林学习(IGL)，将目标函数表示为线性PDE的解，通过学习源项并与格林核积分，在高维空间中实现线性复杂度。该方法可应用于大气传输中的平流扩散和质量守恒问题，为物理信息神经算子提供了新思路。
